prestazioni: VR30DDTT 3.0L twin-turbo V6 engine: Full bolt-on upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 0.82 A/R) paired with Tomei 272°/272° camshafts, Tomei Type-S valve springs, and Tomei 1.2mm head gasket for 18psi sustained boost on E85 fuel

HKS Hi-Power SP exhaust system with 3.5-inch titanium-coated piping, HKS Racing Suction Reloaded intake, and custom AAM Competition intercooler (1200hp-capable core) with integrated water-methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit, 50/50 mix)

Nismo-spec 8-speed automatic transmission with PTT (Paddle-Shift Transmission) recalibration via UpRev ECU reflash (launch control at 4500rpm, flat-foot shifting, and custom torque maps for 0-60mph in 2.9s), paired with OS Giken Super Lock LSD and Nismo carbon driveshaft
estetica: Veilside Fortune 3 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust outlets), retaining the Z Proto’s signature C-pillar design

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV damping, 2-way adjustable, 30-way rebound, and 10kg/mm front/12kg/mm rear springs) with custom top mounts from Cusco, paired with Nismo 20-inch forged wheels (10.5J front, 11.5J rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35R20 front, 305/30R20 rear)

Full carbon fiber aero package by Rocket Bunny (Pandem), including a GT-style rear wing (adjustable 0-20° angle, 3D-printed aluminum mounts), front splitter with integrated air curtains, and side skirts with vortex generators, all finished in Nissan’s ‘Thunder Blue’ with matte clear coat
